'''鈭歡-v-v''' ('''kagavav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hemorrhage|hemorrhage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hemorrhage|hemorrhage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-v-v
|-
! Lemma
| kagavav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigavav|thigavav]] || [[word:jigavav|jigavav]] || [[word:shigavav|shigavav]] || [[word:kigavav|kigavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugavav|thuthugavav]] || [[word:jujugavav|jujugavav]] || [[word:shushugavav|shushugavav]] || [[word:kukugavav|kukugavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugavav|thugavav]] || [[word:jugavav|jugavav]] || [[word:shugavav|shugavav]] || [[word:kugavav|kugavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugavav|thugavav]] || [[word:jugavav|jugavav]] || [[word:shugavav|shugavav]] || [[word:kugavav|kugavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegavav|thegavav]] || [[word:jegavav|jegavav]] || [[word:shegavav|shegavav]] || [[word:kegavav|kegavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogavav|thothogavav]] || [[word:jojogavav|jojogavav]] || [[word:shoshogavav|shoshogavav]] || [[word:kokogavav|kokogavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogavav|thogavav]] || [[word:jogavav|jogavav]] || [[word:shogavav|shogavav]] || [[word:kogavav|kogavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogavav|thogavav]] || [[word:jogavav|jogavav]] || [[word:shogavav|shogavav]] || [[word:kogavav|kogavav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]] || [[word:gavav|gavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gavav|th忙gavav]] || [[word:j忙gavav|j忙gavav]] || [[word:sh忙gavav|sh忙gavav]] || [[word:k忙gavav|k忙gavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagavav|thathagavav]] || [[word:jajagavav|jajagavav]] || [[word:shashagavav|shashagavav]] || [[word:kakagavav|kakagavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagavav|thagavav]] || [[word:jagavav|jagavav]] || [[word:shagavav|shagavav]] || [[word:kagavav|kagavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagavav|thagavav]] || [[word:jagavav|jagavav]] || [[word:shagavav|shagavav]] || [[word:kagavav|kagavav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagavav|shagavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagavav|goshagavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagavav|gokishagavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagavavn眉|shagavavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagavavnkn眉|goshagavavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagavavn眉|gokishagavavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagavavsh毛|shagavavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagavavnksh毛|goshagavavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagavavsh毛|gokishagavavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagavavro|shagavavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagavavnkro|goshagavavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagavavro|gokishagavavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagavavmu|shagavavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagavavnkmu|goshagavavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagavavmu|gokishagavavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagavavsher|shagavavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagavavnksher|goshagavavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagavavsher|gokishagavavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagavavng|shagavavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagavavnkng|goshagavavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagavavng|gokishagavavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagavavya|shagavavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagavavnkya|goshagavavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagavavya|gokishagavavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagavavyam|shagavavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagavavnkyam|goshagavavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagavavyam|gokishagavavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagavavn眉sh毛|shagavavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagavavnkn眉sh毛|goshagavavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagavavn眉sh毛|gokishagavavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagavavn眉ro|shagavavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagavavnkn眉ro|goshagavavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagavavn眉ro|gokishagavavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagavavn眉mu|shagavavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagavavnkn眉mu|goshagavavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagavavn眉mu|gokishagavavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagavavsh毛n眉|shagavavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagavavnksh毛n眉|goshagavavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagavavsh毛n眉|gokishagavavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagavavsh毛ro|shagavavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagavavnksh毛ro|goshagavavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagavavsh毛ro|gokishagavavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagavavsh毛mu|shagavavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagavavnksh毛mu|goshagavavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagavavsh毛mu|gokishagavavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagavavron眉|shagavavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagavavnkron眉|goshagavavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagavavron眉|gokishagavavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagavavrosh毛|shagavavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagavavnkrosh毛|goshagavavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagavavrosh毛|gokishagavavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagavavromu|shagavavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagavavnkromu|goshagavavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagavavromu|gokishagavavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagavavmun眉|shagavavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagavavnkmun眉|goshagavavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagavavmun眉|gokishagavavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagavavmush毛|shagavavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagavavnkmush毛|goshagavavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagavavmush毛|gokishagavavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagavavmuro|shagavavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagavavnkmuro|goshagavavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagavavmuro|gokishagavavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
